target.title: feat(cli): add openclaw context map command
target.body:
## Summary

Adds `openclaw context map` — a CLI command that renders the same WinDirStat-style context treemap PNG that `/context map` sends in-chat, but from the terminal without needing a connected channel.

```
openclaw context map                           # most recently active session
openclaw context map --session agent:main:me   # specific session key
openclaw context map --output ~/ctx.png        # save to a specific path
```

The command calls `sessions.list` with `includeContextWeight: true` via the gateway RPC, picks the most recently updated session that has a cached run report, and feeds the `SessionSystemPromptReport` into the existing `renderContextTreemapPng` renderer. If no run report exists yet (no messages sent in the session), it prints a clear hint to send a message first.

### Files changed

- `src/cli/context-cli.ts` — barrel export
- `src/cli/context-cli/register.ts` — command implementation
- `src/cli/program/register.subclis-core.ts` — wired into the CLI loader
- `src/cli/program/subcli-descriptors.ts` — registered in the help index
- `src/cli/command-catalog.ts` — policy entry (`loadPlugins: "never"`, `networkProxy: "bypass"`)

## Verification

Build passes clean:
```
pnpm build  # exit 0
```

Type check passes clean:
```
pnpm tsgo --noEmit  # 0 errors
```

Help output:
```
$ openclaw context --help
Usage: openclaw context [options] [command]

Inspect session context usage

Commands:
  map  Render a treemap PNG of the current session context contributors

$ openclaw context map --help
Usage: openclaw context map [options]

Render a treemap PNG of the current session context contributors

Options:
  --session <key>   Session key to inspect (defaults to most recently active)
  --output <path>   Output path for the PNG (defaults to openclaw tmp dir)
  --url <url>       Gateway WebSocket URL
  --token <token>   Gateway token (if required)
  --timeout <ms>    Timeout in ms (default: "30000")
  --expect-final    Wait for final response (agent) (default: false)
```
